commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Even he shall build the temple of the LORD; and he shall bear the glory, and shall sit and rule upon his throne; and he shall be a priest upon his throne: and the counsel of peace shall be between them both. Septuagint, "virtue "or "receive strength "and courage, are ten; (Haydock) or one of the crowns, as prince of Juda, ver. (Calmet) Both. That is, he shall unite in himself the two offices or dignities of king and priest. (Challoner) Zorobabel and Jesus shall act in concert.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Between them both: That is, he shall unite in himself the two offices or dignities of king and priest.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
